title: King Hacker - Creepypasta
body:
King Hacker - Creepypasta

King Hacker is a sort of old creepypasta and is said to be the brother of entity 303, and i want to add lore later on in the mod but for now this is its early stage and everything featured and King Hacker can do will be listed below this and this mod is expermentail but if it turns out good i will update it more...


1 Structure,
Cultstone Block,
Cultstone Ingot,
and The Cultstone Sword


King Hacker himself winch he can kill you, stalk you, and kick you from your world...

Fabric Versions Requires: [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
